name: Marcoplaisier.GitHub.io
body:
# Building Simple Sensors
Hardware is notoriously hard to get right. Designing is hard and putting it in production is even harder. Of course that doesn't mean we shouldn't try. 

## Measuring Hamsters
The first project is to measure the top speed and distance of a single hamster.
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
